description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden hall tree with a bench and integrated shelving, designed for use in entryways or mudrooms. The structure features a high back with two horizontal slats, each fitted with a row of metal hooks for hanging coats, hats, or bags. Below the hooks, there is a wide bench seat, which can be used for sitting while putting on shoes. Underneath the bench, there are two open shelves suitable for storing shoes, baskets, or other small items. The wood has a dark, rich finish, giving the piece a classic and sturdy appearance. The overall design is functional and space-efficient, making it ideal for urban homes, garages, or communal building lobbies.
description: A tall, dark wooden hall tree with a bench, coat hooks, and two open shelves below. It combines seating and storage for entryways or mudrooms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bench, two open shelves, and two rows of hooks on the back panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bench and the vertical structure of the back panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel and the horizontal slats without visible hooks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the bench depth and vertical frame.
